title: Return of the Void Fog
description: This datapack brings back the classic void fog as a hidden biome found between layers -50 and -64, shrouding the world’s depths in a dark and mysterious atmosphere.
body:
![Logo](https://i.postimg.cc/VNC3VSCT/void-fog.png)
[![discord-plural](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/social/discord-plural_64h.png)]([https://discord.gg/wJxqmfRqaN](https://discord.gg/NeQWTETTbj)) 
[![kofi-idk](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/donate/kofi-singular_64h.png)](https://ko-fi.com/kiwikcz)
# 📖 Description
This datapack reintroduces the nostalgic Void Fog effect to modern Minecraft, not as a visual glitch but as a mysterious underground biome. Found between layers -50 and -64, this dark and misty region fills the deepest parts of the world with a dense, creeping fog that blurs vision and adds an eerie, atmospheric feeling reminiscent of the early days of Minecraft exploration.



![Image](https://i.postimg.cc/T1DLyJLb/void-fog-torch.png)
